{{Quote|Lazerian system, star: Lazerian.|Lazerian system datafile|<ref name="TSoK" />}}
'''Lazerian''' was a moderate-sized [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] located in the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]], a part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by eight [[Planet/Legends|planets]], including the Lazerian [[Star system/Legends|system's]] center of population and commerce, [[Lazerian IV]], as well as the [[Rokwahl Asteroid Belt]]. Other planets circling the star included the [[Prison/Legends|penal]] [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] [[Acorvus]] and the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony [[Dborian]]. The Lazerian system was situated along the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]], and due to it and the [[Ropagi system/Legends|Ropagi system's]] star [[Ropagi/Legends|Ropagi's]] location at the endpoints of the [[Kira Run]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route, the two suns were known as the "[[Twin Stars of Kira]]."

==Description==
Lazerian was a moderate-sized [[Color/Legends|yellow]]<ref name="TSoK" /> class G<ref name="Type" /> [[Star/Legends|star]] located in the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]]. With the exception of the [[Kira system/Legends|Kira system]], the Lazerian and [[Ropagi system/Legends|Ropagi systems]] were the sole [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] on the [[Kira Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], and as such, Lazerian and [[Ropagi/Legends|Ropagi]], which were located at the endpoints of that [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route, were known as the "[[Twin Stars of Kira]]."<ref name="TSoK" /> Lazerian was located within the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]],<ref name="TEA-OC" /> in the [[Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEA" /> Along with the rest of the Lazerian system, Lazerian lay along the trade route known as the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]].<ref name="TSoK" />

[[File:Kira_Run.png|thumb|left|300px|Lazerian was the star of the Lazerian system, which was an endpoint of the Kira Run.]]
In order from the closest to farthest [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]], Lazerian was circled by eight planets: [[Alkur]], [[Kelro]], [[Acorvus]], [[Lazerian IV]], [[Dborian]], [[Lazerian VI]], [[Lazerian VII]], and [[Lazerian IX]]. Resting in between the orbits of Lazerian VII and Lazerian IX was the [[Rokwahl Asteroid Belt]], which was utilized for [[Mining/Legends|mining]] purposes. Lazerian IV and Dborian both had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] while Lazerian VI and Lazerian VII had eight and ten moons, respectively. Several [[transponder buoy]]s orbited Lazerian as well and were used to allow [[Starship/Legends|starship]] traffic to pass through Rokwahl unharmed. Lazerian IV was the center of the system's population and was home to a [[Human]] population known as the [[Lazerian (people)|Lazerians]] as well as the native [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Akwin]]. Dborian was utilized as a mining colony, while Acorvus was a [[Prison/Legends|penal]] colony.<ref name="TSoK" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lazerian was created by [[John Terra]] and introduced in [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']], a [[1993]] supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TSoK" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Lazerian system, and therefore Lazerian itself, in grid square N-15.<ref name="TEA" />
